mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(link_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_link WHERE user_id =
INSERT INTO cm_topo_link ( user_id, grp_no, item_no1, item_no2, link_no, mng_no1, mng_no2, if_idx1, sh_evt, link_idx1, link_idx2, is_main, traffic1, traffic2, traffic_type1, traffic_type2, evt_level1, evt_level2, line_type, is_multi, line_size, line_style, line_color, polling_color, curve_x1, curve_y1, curve_x2, curve_y2, line_point_ud1, line_point_ud2, line_point_lr1, line_point_lr2, line_traffic_effect, line_traffic_effect_speed, line_flow_effect, line_flow_effect_speed, line_flow_effect_count, line_flow_effect_color, line_label_conf ) VALUES ( , #{grpNo}, #{itemNo1}, #{itemNo2}, #{linkNo}, #{mngNo1}, #{mngNo2}, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0,
'A', 'A',
'I', 'I',
0, 0, #{lineType}, #{isMulti}, #{lineSize}, #{lineStyle}, #{lineColor}, #{pollingColor}, #{curveX1}, #{curveY1}, #{curveX2}, #{curveY2}, #{linePointUD1}, #{linePointUD2}, #{linePointLR1}, #{linePointLR2}, #{lineTrafficEffect}, #{lineTrafficEffectSpeed}, #{lineFlowEffect}, #{lineFlowEffectSpeed}, #{lineFlowEffectCount}, #{lineFlowEffectColor}, #{lineLabelConf} )

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(link_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_link WHERE user_id =
INSERT INTO cm_topo_link ( user_id, grp_no, if_idx1, line_size, line_type, sh_evt, item_no1, item_no2, link_no, evt_level1, evt_level2, link_idx1, link_idx2, is_main, is_multi, traffic1, traffic2, traffic_type1, traffic_type2 ) VALUES ( , #{grpNo}, 0, 5, 1, 1, #{itemNo1}, #{itemNo2}, #{linkNo}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, null, null, 'A', 'A' )
mapper.select: SELECT A.uniq_id, A.item_alias AS item_name, COALESCE(A.xpoint, 950) AS xpoint, COALESCE(A.ypoint, 650) AS ypoint, A.item_no, A.grp_no, A.mng_no, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, A.usr_kind, COALESCE(A.item_size, 3) AS item_size, '' AS dev_ip, A.item_alias, COALESCE(A.font_size, 2) AS font_size, COALESCE(A.evt_level, 4) AS evt_level, 0 AS eng_no, A.evt_type, 0 AS child_cnt, A.temp1, A.temp2, A.temp3 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'POINT' AND A.grp_no = #{grpNo} AND item_no IN (#{item}) AND A.user_id =
mapper.update: UPDATE cm_topo_link SET line_color = #{lineColor}, polling_color = #{pollingColor}, line_size = #{lineSize}, line_style = #{lineStyle}, line_traffic_effect = #{lineTrafficEffect}, line_traffic_effect_speed = #{lineTrafficEffectSpeed}, line_flow_effect = #{lineFlowEffect}, line_flow_effect_speed = #{lineFlowEffectSpeed}, line_flow_effect_count = #{lineFlowEffectCount}, line_flow_effect_color = #{lineFlowEffectColor}, line_label_conf = #{lineLabelConf} WHERE user_id = AND grp_no = #{grpNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(link_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_link WHERE user_id =
INSERT INTO cm_topo_link ( user_id, grp_no, mng_no1, mng_no2, item_no1, item_no2, link_no, if_idx1, if_idx2, link_name1, link_name2, sh_evt, link_idx1, link_idx2, is_main, traffic1, traffic2, traffic_type1, traffic_type2, evt_level1, evt_level2, line_type, is_multi, line_size, line_style, line_color, polling_color, curve_x1, curve_y1, curve_x2, curve_y2, line_point_ud1, line_point_ud2, line_point_lr1, line_point_lr2, line_traffic_effect, line_traffic_effect_speed, line_flow_effect, line_flow_effect_speed, line_flow_effect_count, line_flow_effect_color, line_label_conf ) VALUES ( , #{grpNo}, #{mngNo1}, #{mngNo2}, #{itemNo1}, #{itemNo2}, #{linkNo}, #{ifIdx1}, #{ifIdx2}, #{ifName1}, #{ifName2}, 1, 0, 0, 0, null, null,
'A', 'A',
'I', 'I',
0, 0, #{lineType}, #{isMulti}, #{lineSize}, #{lineStyle}, #{lineColor}, #{pollingColor}, #{curveX1}, #{curveY1}, #{curveX2}, #{curveY2}, #{linePointUD1}, #{linePointUD2}, #{linePointLR1}, #{linePointLR2}, #{lineTrafficEffect}, #{lineTrafficEffectSpeed}, #{lineFlowEffect}, #{lineFlowEffectSpeed}, #{lineFlowEffectCount}, #{lineFlowEffectColor}, #{lineLabelConf} )
